actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The new chief executive of the Scottish Enterprise economic development agency has been announced.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Mr Keiller will take over from Crawford Gillies

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Donald Trump has accused the media of lying about the size of the crowd at his inauguration.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: There are no official figures for the number of people who went to the events

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Police are appealing for information after a man's body was found in a supermarket car park.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A road in Bristol has been repainted after a spelling mistake was spotted.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: "Bup stop" was painted in large yellow lettering

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Police have named a man who died in a crash in the Borders.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Norton have been named the TT team of the year at the annual awards ceremony.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Norton were the only team to have two top-10 finishers in both the Superbike and Senior TT races.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Southampton striker Graziano Pelle has signed a new four-year contract with the Premier League club.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The individual medals will be decided later on Tuesday, with the final round starting at 18:00 BST.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A faultless show jumping round from Astier Nicolas secured first place.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Connah's Quay Nomads have been knocked out of the Europa League by Serbian side Vojvodina.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Leicester Tigers have signed two players.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Second-row Harry Wells and versatile forward Harry Thacker
